name: Skill points allocate and reset from the Skills tab
description: Allocating a point updates the skill count; Reset returns all points.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the game with the URL path /?fresh=1 (this starts a brand-new save) and wait for the game HUD showing GOLD to load
If a plus/allocate button is enabled on any skill, click it once and note the skill's point count; if no points are available, verify the allocate buttons are disabled and stop here
Click the reset button if a point was allocated
Verify the skill point count returned to its value before allocation
